values: Controlled workbook for maintaining Clearing course availability and entry information
This workbook is the controlled editorial source for the Clearing course finder.
• Never publish directly from this workbook; publish only validator-generated files
One of the named web officers updates course rows and records every material change.
• Never use formulas, HTML, scripts or merged cells inside the Courses table
A second named officer reviews the QA Dashboard and preview before publication.
• Course and entry URLs must use https://www.keele.ac.uk/
Keep the master in a restricted Teams/SharePoint folder with version history enabled.
• Foundation Year course URLs must include #foundationyear
• Use Display = No instead of deleting a temporarily suppressed record
Open the Teams master and confirm nobody else is making structural changes.
Duplicate the workbook before a new Clearing cycle or major bulk revision.
1. Validator creates JSON, static HTML backup, manifest, checksums and validation report
Edit only the Courses table. Use the supplied dropdowns; do not rename, move or delete columns.
2. Rename the current server JSON/HTML into the dated archive folder
Keep existing Record IDs unchanged. Assign a new unique ID only for genuinely new routes.
3. Upload new files with .next filenames using SFTP
Record a concise Change Note and update Last Reviewed for every changed row.
4. Confirm file sizes, permissions, checksum and preview totals
Check Row Check and the QA Dashboard. Any issue means the dataset must not be published.
5. Rename .next files to their live names
Export a copy and run the local validator/build script. Review its HTML report and backup website.
6. Verify the finder, static backup, timestamp and counts
A second officer approves the preview, records the release in Change Log, then deploys via SFTP.
Rollback: restore the previous archived JSON and HTML, then verify again
Open, but places are constrained and may close quickly.
Not currently open for ordinary offers; enquiries may join a waiting list.
No vacancies. Retained for clear public status and possible rollback/reopening.
